Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}Did you eat the special Hagakure ramen? I heard that if you eat it with a friend...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}You'll be friends forever! It might just be another rumor, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}When I'm as old as you, I'm gonna go have some with my friends.[n]{f 1 1}
